name: SOTorrent Dataset
description: A comprehensive dataset of Stack Overflow posts, including code snippets and text, ideal for software evolution and NLP research. It is highly relevant for analyzing programming questions and answers.

name: Python Programming Questions
description: A collection of Python-specific programming questions. Suitable for training models on code generation or question-answering tasks.

name: Python Programming Questions (Tapos-Minmoy)
description: A dataset containing Python programming questions, useful for fine-tuning LLMs on coding tasks.

name: Programming Questions (RJ1200)
description: A repository of general programming questions. Useful for training models on technical Q&A.

name: Programming-Questions (RJ1200 Duplicate)
description: A duplicate repository of general programming questions. Useful for training models on technical Q&A.

name: Corpus of Decisions: International Court of Justice (CD-ICJ)
description: A legal corpus containing decisions and opinions. While focused on law, it includes R programming language data and NLP resources.

name: EXIOBASE 3
description: Environmental-economic accounting data. Not related to programming questions.

name: SinoLC-1
description: High-resolution land-cover map of China. Not related to programming questions.

name: Reliance on Science
description: Patent-to-paper citation data. Not related to programming questions.

name: FSD50K
description: Audio dataset for sound event recognition. Not related to programming questions.

name: Mammal Diversity Database
description: Taxonomic database for mammals. Not related to programming questions.

name: The PRIMAP-hist national historical emissions time series
description: Historical emissions data. Not related to programming questions.

name: A global network of biomedical relationships derived from text
description: Biomedical relationship networks from PubMed. Not related to programming questions.

name: A dataset of neonatal EEG recordings with seizures annotations
description: EEG recordings for seizure detection. Not related to programming questions.

name: Academic Motivation Scale (AMS) Intrinsic Motivation (IM) Questionnaire and Data
description: Survey data on student motivation. Not related to programming questions.

name: GLOBMAP global Leaf Area Index since 1981
description: Global Leaf Area Index data. Not related to programming questions.

name: Commodity-driven deforestation, associated carbon emissions and trade 2001-2023
description: Deforestation and carbon emission data. Not related to programming questions.

name: Collection of textures in colorectal cancer histology
description: Histological texture images. Not related to programming questions.

name: K-EmoCon, a multimodal sensor dataset for continuous emotion recognition
description: Multimodal sensor data for emotion recognition. Not related to programming questions.

name: FSDKaggle2018
description: Audio tagging dataset. Not related to programming questions.

name: Kelmarsh wind farm data
description: SCADA data for wind turbines. Not related to programming questions.

name: Auditory Attention Detection Dataset KULeuven
description: EEG data for auditory attention detection. Not related to programming questions.

name: Summary-level data from meta-analysis of fat distribution phenotypes
description: Genomic meta-analysis data. Not related to programming questions.

name: NEON Tree Crowns Dataset
description: LiDAR and remote sensing data for tree crown detection. Not related to programming questions.
